title: P15 commit_sha null inventory
objective:
Run script:
"""
patterns = ['commit_sha', 'commitSha', 'commit sha', 'commit']
roots = [Path('governance'), Path('tools'), Path('scripts'), Path('tests')]
findings = []
for root in roots:
    if not root.exists():
        continue
    for path in root.rglob('*'):
        if not path.is_file():
            continue
        if path.suffix.lower() not in ['.py', '.js', '.ts', '.json', '.md', '.yml', '.yaml']:
            continue
        text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
        if any(p in text for p in patterns):
            findings.append(str(path))
state = Path('governance/state/P15_COMMIT_SHA_NULL_INVENTORY.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P15','trace_id':'p15_commit_sha_null_inventory','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'finding_count':len(findings),'findings':findings[:100],'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'P15B commit_sha null remediation plan'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P15_COMMIT_SHA_NULL_INVENTORY.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# P15 | commit_sha null inventory\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nFound candidate files containing commit-related fields. Workflow lock respected; no .github/workflows files touched.\n\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + f for f in findings[:100]) + '\n\nNext: P15B commit_sha null remediation plan.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8').rstrip() + '\n## P15 completed | 2026-06-04\ncommit_sha null inventory completed. Candidate file count: ' + str(len(findings)) + '. Workflow lock respected. Next: P15B commit_sha null remediation plan.\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(ctx))
"""No issue comments.
